title: Season-two shell and expedition approach phase
summary: Fifty-second structured packet for Eco Explorer. This second lane-1 long-push wave strengthens the season-two shell around the active route and then adds one compact expedition-approach seam for the next big chapter.

execution_order.why_now: Once travel and recap are warmer, the broader season-two shell is the next systems gain.
The active route and season shell should feel more settled without a bigger planner.
The shell should stay calm and readable.
The next big chapter should start to feel present without opening early.
A tiny approach seam can keep the field station feeling future-facing without dashboard drift.
The next expedition should feel present, not prematurely playable or noisy.

guardrails: Do not add a new station page.
Keep one clear active outing and one soft expedition-approach seam.
Reuse current station and map surfaces.
acceptance_focus: Season two feels more settled around the active route.
The next expedition starts to feel quietly present.
handoff_prompt: Read AGENTS.md, .agents/lane-runner.md, .agents/project-memory.md, .agents/work-queue.md, .agents/lanes/lane-1.md, docs/reports/2026-04-02-season-two-shell-and-expedition-approach-phase.md, and this packet. Treat this as the second lane-1 long-push wave: strengthen the season-two shell around the active route, then add one compact expedition-approach seam without opening a bigger planner.
